scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,swagger -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run swagger --prefix openapi"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n frontend,mock,swagger -c blue,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:mock --prefix frontend" "npm run mock --prefix openapi" "npm run swagger --prefix openapi"
